summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Table Transfer feature - Backend 100% pass (13/13 tests), Frontend UI fully functional. All transfer flows working correctly.

issues: Tables appear duplicated in the view when scrolling (visual artifact, not functional issue)

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/users/waiters returns active waiters and cashiers
Backend: GET /api/users/waiters requires authentication
Backend: POST /api/tables/{table_id}/transfer - waiter can transfer own occupied table
Backend: POST /api/tables/{table_id}/transfer - admin can transfer any occupied table
Backend: POST /api/tables/{table_id}/transfer - rejects non-occupied table (400)
Backend: POST /api/tables/{table_id}/transfer - rejects same waiter transfer (400)
Backend: POST /api/tables/{table_id}/transfer - rejects unauthorized waiter (403)
Backend: POST /api/tables/{table_id}/transfer - rejects invalid target waiter (404)
Backend: POST /api/tables/{table_id}/transfer - rejects non-waiter target (400)
Backend: POST /api/tables/{table_id}/transfer - requires authentication
Backend: POST /api/tables/{table_id}/transfer - returns 404 for non-existent table
Backend: Table claim and release functionality
Frontend: Waiter login with PIN 2222 works correctly
Frontend: TablesViewPage displays tables with correct status colors
Frontend: Transfer button visible on waiter's own tables
Frontend: Transfer button visible to admin on other waiters' tables
Frontend: TransferTableDialog opens correctly from TablesViewPage
Frontend: TransferTableDialog opens correctly from TableOrderPage header
Frontend: TransferTableDialog shows available waiters/cashiers (excluding current)
Frontend: Selecting waiter and confirming transfer works
Frontend: After transfer, navigates back to tables view
Frontend: Table status updates correctly after transfer
Frontend: Toast notifications show transfer success
critical_code_review_comments: TransferTableDialog.js: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)
TablesViewPage.js: Tables appear to be rendered twice in the grid (visual duplication when scrolling)
seed_data_creation: Used POST /api/seed to create initial data including admin, cashier, waiter users and 10 tables
context_for_next_testing_agent: Table transfer feature fully tested and working. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_table_transfer.py cover all edge cases. Frontend transfer flow tested via Playwright - waiter can transfer own tables, admin can transfer any table. TransferTableDialog component works from both TablesViewPage and TableOrderPage.
